candidate_llm_application: LLM pruning schedule trade-offs: aggressive weight-pruning forces concentrated capacity in remaining weights; choosing pruning topology (Guyot-style head vs cordon-style branching) shapes downstream capability.

results.title: Structured Pruning + Curriculum: Survey
